_comment: Listings that eBay refuses to revise. Auto-tagged with a lock badge in the UI and unchecked by default in apply flows. Also auto-learned on the client via localStorage when Apply returns codes 240 (content-policy lock) or 291 (ended listing).

306784122664.reason: title content-policy locked (eBay rejects new titles, no-op succeeds)

306904174454.reason: 7-card Boomer Esiason lot — comp scrape matches single-card prices, agent keeps pushing it UP. Manual repricing only.

306931303163.reason: 4-card Darryl Strawberry lot — only 1 comp, agent treats as 'OK' at any price. Manual repricing only.

306913790653.reason: 11-card Ismail brothers lot — only 1 comp at same price, agent loop-locks it high. Manual repricing only.

306758076966.reason: Charcadet Mega Evolution Promo Holo — sold_history matched a graded/foreign version and ramped $3.50 → $53.99 over 16 runs. Reverted to $3.50; manual repricing only.
